title: 4/21/19 Cracked, have to start exercising again

transcript.text: Hello, it's April 21st, living in Boulder, V-Log. It's April 21st, 2019, Sunday, 11.48 a.m.
So I got to sleep as early as I could. I was on the phone with my fiancé last night until like 11 or whatever.
And then I just kind of laid down with insomnia, just like, because I was nocturnal yesterday.
And so I had insomnia until like 5 in the morning, just laying there, you know, kind of listening to a little bit of music.
When I got super bored, I hate having insomnia. I took a melatonin. Maybe I should buy marijuana.
That'll knock you out if you get really high. Not smoking it, but like eating the candies, it'll knock you out.
It's a great sleeping pill. If anybody has trouble with insomnia, try that stuff.
It'll get you high as fuck though. Like you'll wake up high. So, um, but, uh, so then I had to sleep in, um, it's 11 or whatever, almost 12 now.
Um, I got up maybe an hour ago, half hour ago. Um, and I had breakfast, uh, like a burrito and a half, um, microwave.
And it took me forever to eat because I felt like barfing because I'm really sick.
I can like from non-exercise. I'm really, really sick and, um, toxic and not feeling good.
I mean, I could just, in fact, I could sleep all day now.
Um, but I'm not going to, cause that means I'd be up all night.
So I'm going to go ride my bike, you know, I'm a trainer now.
Um, and I'd like to think that I'm a trainer full-time, you know, I was talking to my fiance last night.
She's like, well, what, don't you can be halfway. Can't you be half and halfer?
Um, um, yeah, we'll see. I just, I definitely don't want to be a, uh, a full-time couch potato.
Cause I'll freaking die, dude. It ain't good.
Uh, so, um, yeah, so that's what I did yesterday.
You know, since the last time I did my vlog, I decided I was going to have to do exercising.
And that's when I did a video on my real channel, my regular channel.

And it's like at a basic stage, which is in one way, in one like way, basic stage pages is, I like it cause it's easy.
I don't have to think to fix it, but on another, uh, it's kind of, it's like, oh my God, I still can't, I still haven't gotten those to a readable level.

I want to do backups.

I'm out of control.

Rode to the top of Magnolia.
